name: example-huashu-bento-insight
title: Bento Insight Grid
description: Apple Keynote / QBR-school bento decks: light-grey #F5F5F7 and cream pages, unequal-height rounded cards with 1px hairlines and micro shadows, one insight per card (giant Geist Mono tabular numeral, linear inline-SVG icon, or SVG sparkline), oversized display headlines with hard weight contrast, Inter/Geist typography on a fixed 1920×1080 canvas. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design design-styles.md bento-grid spec (Bento便当格模块网格, neutral school, 95% fidelity), generated from the spec into a full multi-section deck.

description_i18n.en: Apple Keynote / QBR-school bento decks: light-grey #F5F5F7 and cream pages, unequal-height rounded cards with 1px hairlines and micro shadows, one insight per card (giant Geist Mono tabular numeral, linear inline-SVG icon, or SVG sparkline), oversized display headlines with hard weight contrast, Inter/Geist typography on a fixed 1920×1080 canvas. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design design-styles.md bento-grid spec (Bento便当格模块网格, neutral school, 95% fidelity), generated from the spec into a full multi-section deck.
description_i18n.zh-CN: Apple Keynote/QBR 流派便当格幻灯片：#F5F5F7 浅灰与奶白底、不等高圆角卡片网格（1px 细描边 + 微阴影）、每卡一个洞见（巨型 Geist Mono 等宽数字 / 线性 SVG 图标 / SVG sparkline）、超大 display 标题强字重对比、Inter/Geist 字体、1920×1080 固定画布、零外部 JS 依赖。基于花叔 huashu-design design-styles.md「Bento便当格模块网格」规格（中性派 · 还原95%）按 spec 生成完整多章节 deck。

query.en: Create a bento-grid {{deckType}} for {{audience}} about {{topic}} with {{slideCount}}, using the Bento Insight Grid system (based on the huashu-design design-styles.md Bento Grid spec — Apple Keynote Bento era / MBB Big-Type decks / Stripe metric-card matrices / Pitch.com QBR lineage): a fixed 1920×1080 canvas auto-scaled to the viewport; pages alternating light-grey #F5F5F7 and warm cream #FBFAF7 backgrounds; white/tinted/dark cards with 24–32px border-radius, 1px #E8E8ED hairline, and a micro two-layer shadow; the Inter/Geist + Geist Mono stack from a single Google Fonts @import (the only external reference — no other CDN, no Chart.js, no icon fonts, no emoji); exactly three accents — brand #0071E3 (re-themeable) plus green #1FA958 for positive deltas and orange #F08A24 for caution, never a fourth. Every bento page is an unequal-height CSS grid (6 columns × 1.18fr/1fr rows, mixed spans, one tall span-2 hero card — at most 1 dark #1D1D1F card and 2 tinted cards per page, ≤ 7 cards total); every card holds exactly one insight: a 14px/600 muted label plus one protagonist — a tabular-nums Geist Mono numeral with muted .unit span and rounded ↑/↓ delta pill, a 52px tinted chip with a 1.8-stroke linear inline-SVG icon, or an inline-SVG sparkline (polyline + 14%-opacity area fill). Bar charts are pure CSS flex columns of rounded bars, current period in brand blue, history in #E4E4E9, mono values printed above. Headlines pair 800–900 weight spans with 300–400 thin spans in the same line; kickers are 14px uppercase mono with 3px tracking in brand color. Draw layouts from the locked enumeration: cover (cream, 130–150px display statement + mini KPI card strip) / agenda / master bento / one-insight (300–380px mono numeral, unit glyph in brand) / chart / feature-bento with icon chips / quote (brand SVG quote marks, key phrase in brand) / stats-2x2 / roadmap tracks / closing — use at least 5 distinct layouts across 8–11 pages. Build a single self-contained HTML file by copying example.html and replacing content only — keep its design tokens, grid skeletons, card anatomy, and navigation script (←/→/Space keys, #/N hash routing, click zones, counter pill) intact. Use the user's real numbers, never lorem ipsum or invented data; keep the orange caution treatment for negative metrics; Chinese copy uses 「」 quotes and idiomatic zh-CN; replace all fictional 澄流/ClearFlow demo content.
query.zh-CN: 用「便当格洞见」体系为 {{audience}} 做一套关于 {{topic}} 的 {{deckType}}（页数 {{slideCount}}）：1920×1080 固定画布、#F5F5F7 浅灰与奶白底交替、不等高圆角便当卡（1px 细描边 + 微阴影、每页至多 1 张深色卡 2 张浅彩卡）、每卡只装一个洞见（Geist Mono 等宽巨数 + 涨跌胶囊 / 线性 SVG 图标 / SVG sparkline）、超大 display 标题粗细字重同行对比、品牌蓝 #0071E3 + 绿 #1FA958 + 橙 #F08A24 三色封顶，版式从封面/目录/便当主版/单洞见巨数/图表/功能便当/引语/2×2 指标/路线图/结尾枚举中至少取 5 种。从 example.html 复制出单文件、只换内容，保留 token、网格骨架、卡片解剖和导航脚本；用真实数据、负向指标保留橙色警示、替换全部「澄流 ClearFlow」演示内容。完整规格以英文版为准（follow the en query above）。

inputs.name: topic
inputs.label: Topic
inputs.placeholder: 你的主题，例如：2026 Q2 业务回顾

inputs.name: audience
inputs.label: Audience
inputs.placeholder: 管理层 / 全员大会 / 客户高层
